selected_issues.title: [billwatch] Affiliate tracking endpoint — energy provider + solar referral click tracking
selected_issues.reason: P0 — COMPLETE PARTIAL WORK, REVENUE INFRASTRUCTURE. Partial implementation merged via WIP PR #356 — issue still open, endpoint incomplete. Click tracking is the revenue measurement bridge: without it, billwatch cannot attribute or measure ANY affiliate revenue. Unblocks #335 (solar recommendation engine — EnergySage $25-100/sale, SunPower $75/lead). Revenue chain: user uploads bill → anomaly detected → provider/solar CTA → tracked affiliate click → commission. RESELECTED from cycle 25 — still highest-priority billwatch issue. Worker continues from partial work in main.
